raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both lateral faces of the darker box (box_1) are unobstructed and reachable by the robot. The underlying lighter box (box_2) rests stably on the table, providing enough friction so it will not slide when the upper box is lifted. There is at least 5 cm of clearance above the darker box to allow a vertical lift once grasped.",
    "Postcondition": "The robot’s two end-effectors are pressing laterally against opposite sides of box_1, allowing a firm, balanced grip. Box_1 is lifted a few centimetres above box_2 and is now held securely in mid-air by the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both lateral faces of the darker box (box_1) are unobstructed and reachable by the robot. The underlying lighter box (box_2) rests stably on the table, providing enough friction so it will not slide when the upper box is lifted. There is at least 5 cm of clearance above the darker box to allow a vertical lift once grasped.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The robot’s two end-effectors are pressing laterally against opposite sides of box_1, allowing a firm, balanced grip. Box_1 is lifted a few centimetres above box_2 and is now held securely in mid-air by the robot.
